GBS Content Manager Static site controls, local drafts, exports
View Site Projects Bots Games Reports

GBS CMS Lite

This manager saves edits in your browser and exports clean JSON. For permanent publishing, paste the exported data into assets/js/content.js or wire it to a database later.

Import JSON

Add Project

Breeding runs, hunts, releases, collabs

Add Bot

Discord commands, tools, status

Add Game

Web games, Discord games, simulators

Add Resource

SOPs, guides, docs, media, sponsor links

Local Smoke Reports

Reports saved from the public form
